rewritten_requirements: The system shall display the price and description of each item.
The system shall indicate the end of the sale when all purchases are recorded.
The system shall display the total cost of the purchases.
The system shall calculate and indicate the change to be given to the customer.
The system shall verify the customer's financial solvency by sending a request to an authorisation centre for cheque payments.
The system shall send a request for authorisation to an authorisation centre for credit card payments, according to the card type.
The system shall record the sale and print a receipt.
The system shall send the information on the number of items sold to the stock management system after payment transaction is finished.
The system shall be initialised by the shop manager every morning for the day's operation.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display price and description of each item
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The cash register displays the price of each item and its description.
When all the purchases are recorded, the cashier indicates the end of the sale.
The cash register displays the total cost of the purchases.
the cash register indicates how much change the customer is to be given

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Verify customer financial solvency via authorisation centre (cheque payment)
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the cashier verifies that the customer is financially solvent by sending a request to an authorisation centre via the cash register;

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Send request for authorisation to authorisation centre (credit card payment)
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: a banking terminal forms part of the cash register. It sends a request for authorisation to an authorisation centre, according to the card type.
The cash register records the sale and prints a receipt.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Send information on number of items sold to stock management system
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the payment transaction is finished, the cash register sends the information on the number of items sold to the stock management system.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Initialise cash registers for day (shop manager)
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Every morning, the shop manager initialises the cash registers for the day.
